entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's talent matching platform; the destination for various GTM channel funnels

entities.name: VC platform/talent leads
entities.context: Primary target customer segment—people who support portfolio companies with hiring and want to differentiate their fund

entities.name: Talent Calls
entities.context: Proposed offering—calls for specific archetypes (e.g., 'cracked builder with a taste for design') that funnel candidates into Careerspan

entities.name: VC Job Boards
entities.context: Existing portfolio job boards where Careerspan can overlay CTAs to redirect talent into structured flow

entities.name: Pattern-Break Demos
entities.context: Rapid turnaround demo approach: spoken role description → JD → live job page → curated candidate packet

entities.name: Primary Channel Hypothesis
entities.context: GTM strategy hypothesis focusing on VC platform/talent leads as the main channel

relationships.context: Talent Calls funnel interested candidates into Careerspan
Overlay CTAs on job boards redirect talent into structured Careerspan flow
Demos showcase Careerspan's rapid JD-to-candidate pipeline capability
The hypothesis identifies VC platform leads as the primary GTM channel
